Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class ReplacementMap<S extends Sorted & SyntaxElement>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.ReplacementMap.NoIrrelevantLabelsReplacementMap<S,S>
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.ReplacementMap<S>
Type Parameters:
S - the key and value type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReplacementMap<S,S>, Map<S,S>
Direct Known Subclasses:
TermReplacementMap, VariableReplacementMap
public abstract class ReplacementMap<S extends Sorted & SyntaxElement> extends ReplacementMap.NoIrrelevantLabelsReplacementMap<S,S>
A map from some type to the same type.
